base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goal_roulette — a ui (hud_readout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Stage-end goal-card roulette — Mushroom/Flower/Starman reel spinning. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage-end goal-card roulette — Mushroom/Flower/Starman reel spinning; match-3 rewards 2-5 extra lives
